fixtures.source_shape: born-digital PDF with embedded selectable text
fixtures.expected_behavior: extract embedded text without OCR and preserve page-level diagnostics
expected_warnings: robust PDF extraction is not claimed

fixtures.role: table detection and future table extraction boundary
fixtures.source_shape: market report with tabular financial or volume data
fixtures.expected_behavior: surface table candidates and keep table extraction separate from plain text extraction
expected_warnings: table candidate detection is not table extraction

fixtures.source_shape: image-only scanned PDF with no embedded selectable text
fixtures.expected_behavior: emit no-extractable-text failure candidate unless an explicit OCR adapter is enabled
expected_warnings: OCR is required before text coverage can be claimed

fixtures.expected_behavior: emit pdf_encrypted_requires_password failure candidate without attempting unauthorized extraction
expected_spans: no span expected before authorized password

fixtures.source_shape: PDF with embedded text plus charts or image blocks
fixtures.expected_behavior: extract digital text and record image block diagnostics without interpreting chart truth

fixtures.source_shape: multi-column report where raw extraction order may differ from reading order
fixtures.expected_behavior: extract text while warning that layout fidelity and reading order are not fully proven

fixtures.source_shape: PDF that opens but returns no useful text
fixtures.expected_behavior: emit pdf_no_extractable_text failure candidate and keep robust extraction false
expected_spans: no span expected for empty extraction
